title: BufoCraft
description: A set of Fabric client-side QOL, performance, functional and aesthetics mods for BufoCraft.
body:
Enhance your Minecraft experience with this Fabric client-side modpack that enriches gameplay while preserving the classic vanilla aesthetics and feel. Streamlined with quality-of-life improvements like inventory sorting, tabs, and moving while your inventory is open. Build efficiently using Litematica for custom schematics, reach-around placement, and step-up as a smoother alternative to auto-jump. Navigate your world effortlessly with an integrated minimap and world map. Boost performance through optimization mods and OptiFine parity. Enjoy subtle aesthetic enhancements—like additional particle effects and informative HUD elements—that enhance immersion without altering the core Minecraft look. Designed specifically for BufoCraft, this modpack elevates your game without straying from the vanilla experience but may not be permitted on other servers.

Mods
Quality-of-Life Mods
  • Accessible Step – Configurable step-height adjustment so you smoothly climb small blocks without jumping.
  • AutoClicker – Automates left-clicking at configurable CPS for mining and combat convenience.
  • AutoTotem – Automatically equips a Totem of Undying to your off-hand when your health is low.
  • BactroMod – Implements a hydration mechanic so you must manage water intake underwater.
  • Better Mount HUD – Displays mount health and status in a clean HUD overlay.
  • Better Ping Display – Improves the tab ping display.
  • Better Third Person – Adds dynamic third-person camera angles like peek and smooth rotation.
  • ChatPatches – Restores legacy chat formatting, colors, and hover events.
  • Chat Heads – Shows player head icons next to their chat messages for quick ID.
  • ChestTracker – Marks looted chests on your minimap so you don’t miss any loot.
  • ClickThrough Plus – Lets you click through signs and item frames to chests and other containers.
  • Client Tweaks – Adds inventory sorting, shift-click filtering, recipe tweaks, and more.
  • Crafting Tweaks – Shift-click to move items in and out of crafting grids instantly.
  • DeathFinder – Automatically traces a breadcrumb path back to your last death point.
  • e4mc – Open LAN server to the public.
  • Held Item Info – Shows additional details (attack speed, tooltips) for the item in your hand.
  • Inventory Profiles Next – Save and quickly switch between multiple inventory layouts.
  • InvMove – Allows walking, sprinting, and jumping while any inventory is open.
  • Jade – In-world tooltips showing block and entity info on hover.
  • Litematica – Blueprint schematics with ghost blocks for efficient building.
  • Litematica Printer – Automatically places schematic blocks from inventory slots.
  • Map-In-Slot – Embeds your map directly into a hotbar slot for continuous viewing.
  • MixinTrace – Developer tool to visualize mixin application order and conflicts.
  • Mod Menu – In-game GUI to view and configure installed Fabric mods.
  • Mouse Tweaks – Drag-and-drop in GUIs and double-click to collect item stacks.
  • Name Visibility – Toggle player nameplates and adjust draw distance.
  • NoChatReports – Disables Mojang’s chat-reporting UI and warning messages.
  • Not Enough Crashes – Improves crash reports with clickable stack traces and copy buttons.
  • Paginated Advancements – Splits long advancement lists into pages for easier navigation.
  • Polytone – Adds spatial audio filters and subtle ambient sounds to blocks.
  • ProPlacer – Enables reach-around and fast block placement
  • Replanting Crops – Automatically re-plants seeds when you harvest crops.
  • SchematicPreview – Shows Litematica schematics in-world before you paste them.
  • Reese’s Sodium Options – Extra graphical toggles layered on top of Sodium settings.
  • Stack-to-Nearby-Chests – Distributes items from your cursor into nearby chests with one key.
  • Suggestion Tweaker – Customizes command suggestion menu.
  • Too Many Binds – Pop-up search box for mod keybinds
  • TweakerMore – Extension pack of extra client tweaks layered on Tweakeroo.
  • Tweakeroo – All-in-one toolkit for GUI, hotbar, and recipe-book tweaks.
  • Xaero’s Map Chest Tracker Integration – Merges chest markers from ChestTracker into Xaero’s World Map.
  • Xaero’s World Map – Full-screen world map that mirrors your in-game position.
  • Xaero’s Minimap – Circular minimap with waypoints, cave mode, and cave mapping.
  • Zoomify – Smooth, adjustable zoom with mouse wheel or key hold.
Immersive Mods
  • 3D Skin Layers – Renders additional skin layers (jacket, sleeves) in full 3D.
  • AmbientSounds – Plays context-sensitive environmental sounds for immersion.
  • BetterGrassify – Smooths grass block edges with blended textures.
  • Bobby – Enable greater render distances than the server's view-distance setting.
  • Capes – Enables OptiFine-style cape rendering on Fabric clients.
  • Chunks Fade In – Smooths chunk loading by fading them in instead of popping.
  • Continuity – Connected textures for glass, snow, and other blocks sans OptiFine.
  • Detail Armor Bar – Breaks down each armor piece’s durability and protection in the HUD.
  • Distant Horizons – Renders distant terrain at low detail to extend view distance.
  • Dynamic Crosshair – Crosshair changes size/color based on movement and status.
  • Enhanced Block Entities – Adds bloom/glow effects to chests, furnaces, and other entities.
  • Entity Model Features – Additional layers like capes, tridents, and elytra multiplexing.
  • Entity Texture Features – Connected textures support on mob skins and overlays.
  • Falling Leaves – Drifts leaf particles from trees in autumn biomes.
  • Highlighter – Highlights blocks you look at with a configurable outline and color.
  • ImmersiveThunder – Realistic thunderbolts and rolling thunder audio-visuals.
  • Iris Shaders – Shader-loader fully compatible with OptiFine packs on Fabric.
  • LambDynamicLights – Real-time light sources follow entities and held items.
  • Model Gap Fix – Eliminates tiny rendering gaps between block and item models.
  • MoreMcMeta – Allows large resource-pack metadata and custom manifest data.
  • Not Enough Animations – Supplements missing vanilla animations for smoother motion.
  • Nuit – Custom skyboxes per biome/dimension without OptiFine.
  • Physics Mod – Adds physics to mobs, particles and dropped items.
  • Presence Footsteps – Plays realistic footstep sounds based on surface type.
  • RSLS – Raises Minecraft sound sources limit in a simple way.
  • Sound Physics Remastered – Spatial audio that reacts to block materials and distance.
  • Sounds – Large library of ambient and environmental effects.
  • Tiny Item Animations – Adds little animations when you pick up or insert items with your mouse.
  • Visuality – A simple client-sided cosmetic mod that adds new particles.
  • Wavey Capes – Cape textures animate in a sine-wave for realistic movement.
Performance Mods
  • Debugify – Expands the F3 screen with extra metrics like FPS graph, memory pools, and network stats.
  • Entity Culling – Hides off-screen entities to reduce render overhead.
  • FerriteCore – Optimizes data structures to reduce memory usage.
  • FastQuit – Speeds up game exit by optimizing save-and-close routines.
  • ImmediatelyFast – Removes GUI animation delays for instant screen transitions.
  • Dynamic FPS – Automatically scales frame rate when idle to save CPU/GPU.
  • Lithium – Comprehensive logic optimizer for faster world ticks.
  • More Culling – Further reduces rendering of off-camera objects beyond base culling.
  • Sodium – Major renderer overhaul for smooth, high-FPS performance.
  • Sodium Extra – Additional performance toggles and utility features on top of Sodium.
  • SodiumExtras – Experimental speed tweaks from the Sodium team.
Library Mods
  • Architecture API – Abstraction layer for cross-platform Fabric/Quilt/Forge mod development.
  • Balm – Common utilities and abstractions for multi-platform mods.
  • CICADA – General helper functions and utilities for Fabric authors.
  • Cloth Config API – Config-screen library for in-game mod settings.
  • Fabric API – Core hooks and interfaces for Fabric modding.
  • Fabric Language Kotlin – Kotlin support and DSLs for writing Fabric mods.
  • Forge Config API Port – Port of Forge’s configuration system to Fabric.
  • Iceberg – Fabric Rendering API reference implementation used by shader mods.
  • libIPN – GUI/config library powering Inventory Profiles Next.
  • MaLiLib – Shared code library for masa’s Fabric mods.
  • M.R.U – Utilities library for performance-focused mods.
  • Puzzle – Unified config framework aimed at OptiFine replacements.
  • YetAnotherConfigLib – Versatile in-game config GUI library.
  • Collective – Shared utilities for multiple Fabric mods (e.g. Better Eating, AppleSkin).
  • CreativeCore – Core library for Creative-mode and recipe mod support.
  • MixinTrace – (Also listed in QoL) developer library for Mixin conflict tracing.
  • ModernFix – Compatibility and stability fixes for modern Fabric versions.
Update Watchlist
  • CIT Resewn – Re-implements OptiFine’s Custom Item Textures system on Fabric.
  • Eating Animation – Adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items.
  • Inventory Tabs – Allows swapping to other in-world screens blocks, entities, etc via tabs.
Resource Packs
  • Fresh Animations – Smooth, realistic entity animations replacing vanilla mob motions.
    • Fresh Animations Extensions – Extra customization add-ons for Fresh Animations, including additional mob models and tweaks.
  • UltimaCraft – Vanilla-styled pack that adds new textures, animations, random block variations, and OptiFine features.
    • UltimaCraft Enchantments – Unique per-enchantment textures for books, tools, and armor (requires OptiFine/CIT Resewn).
    • UltimaCraft Models – Adds custom 3D models for blocks, items, and entities.
    • UltimaCraft PBR – LabPBR shader support add-on for realistic material effects under OptiFine.
    • BufoCraft Resource Pack Compilation – Curated compilation of textures and assets to provide a cohesive, vanilla-friendly visual style for BufoCraft.
Shader Packs
  • Complementary Shaders – Reimagined – High-quality, performance-tuned shader preserving Minecraft’s visual identity with two default styles and block-specific effects.
Server Plugins
  • EssentialsX – Core suite of over 130 commands and utilities for Spigot/Paper servers.
    • EssentialsX Chat – Chat formatting module requiring the main EssentialsX plugin.
    • EssentialsX Discord – Lightweight bridge syncing in-game chat and events with Discord channels.
    • EssentialsX DiscordLink – Syncs Vault groups with Discord roles and handles account linking.
    • EssentialsX GeoIP – Displays approximate player locations using the MaxMind GeoLite2 database in `/whois`.
  • FreedomChat – Completely disables Mojang’s chat-reporting system server-side for privacy.
  • LuckPerms – Scalable, web-editable permissions manager supporting Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, Forge, Fabric, Velocity, and more.
  • Vault – Universal Permissions, Chat & Economy API that gives plugins easy hooks into these systems.
